name: perceived_education_quality
description: Captures respondents' overall evaluations of the Mexican education system, including perceived changes over time, quality ratings, and beliefs about whether schooling delivers practical life and labor market value.

name: school_environment_quality
description: Measures respondents' assessments of the physical and social conditions of their school, including infrastructure adequacy, safety perceptions, teacher engagement, and peer prosocial behavior.

name: digital_and_cultural_capital
description: Assesses the breadth of informational, technological, and cultural resources available to and used by respondents, reflecting socioeconomic and educational capital relevant to educational opportunity and outcomes.

name: educational_equity_beliefs
description: Captures respondents' beliefs about fairness and inclusivity in the education system, including whether schooling is accessible to all, treats women equitably, and accommodates students with disabilities.

name: educational_trajectory_and_continuity
description: Measures the respondent's educational history, current enrollment status, reasons for leaving or continuing school, and aspirations for future study, reflecting patterns of educational persistence and dropout.
